_comment: The grant/credit tracker. Update status/used as you go. track.mjs flags expiry + waste. Lane decisions live in CLAUDE.md.

grants.name: PostHog
grants.note: Boost BAA add-on may be cash for MedReview PHI

grants.name: Depot
grants.note: Startup plan, $5k committed credit, 1yr term. Depot managed runners connect at the GitHub-org level (Depot GitHub App on the org), so every repo in the org can use runs-on: depot-ubuntu-24.04 with no per-repo step. CONFIRMED WORKING 2026-06-09: after the org move and connecting the Depot GitHub App to InnerScopeHearing, a canary (avatar-build-image on depot-ubuntu-24.04) was picked up by a Depot runner (group 'depot') in seconds. This repo's avatar-build-image now runs on the Depot runner; remaining = flip the heavy app repos (their own sessions). DEPOT_TOKEN + project id 4dl4ww0nk4 are for `depot build` Docker caching, separate from the runners.

grants.name: Azure Founders Hub
grants.lane: PHI self-host + Azure OpenAI + GitHub Enterprise

grants.name: Porter.run
grants.lane: deploy (K8s) - HOLD, Cloud Run covers it
